title: Scheduled entry engine
acceptance_criteria: Constructor takes { clock: Clock, db: Pool, straddleCalc: StraddleCalculator, vixFeed: VixFeed, personalityId: string }
Reads configuration from env vars: ENTRY_TIME (default '09:17'), ENTRY_CUTOFF_TIME (default '09:45'), BLOCKED_DATES (JSON array of YYYY-MM-DD strings)
Uses clock.today() to get the current IST trading date; compares against BLOCKED_DATES — if today is blocked, logs INFO 'Entry blocked: event day [date]' and returns without emitting

Entry time window enforcement: entry only fires if clock.toISTTime(clock.now()) is between '09:15' and ENTRY_CUTOFF_TIME inclusive (string comparison in HH:mm format works correctly since time format is zero-padded)

Checks if the personality already has an open paper_trades row for today (query WHERE status='open' AND DATE(entry_time AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Kolkata') = clock.today()) — skips if already open to prevent duplicate entries

On valid entry: emits an EntryIntent object { personalityId, timestamp: clock.now(), underlying: 'NIFTY', expiry: getCurrentWeeklyExpiry(), atmStrike, straddleValue, vixAtEntry: vixFeed.getCurrentVix() }
ALL time comparisons use clock.toISTTime() and clock.today() — never Date.now() or new Date() directly
Exports type EntryIntent and class EntryEngine; all named exports
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of every non-obvious decision
